overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Origins showing a hooded character exploring ancient Egyptian Memphis at night. The character carries a torch through narrow mud-brick alleys, enters buildings, crosses elevated walkways over water, and navigates through the historic city as the torch extinguishes halfway through.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow mud-brick alley with wooden overhead scaffolding

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the narrow alley holding a torch, illuminating the mud-brick walls and wooden scaffolding overhead

notable_agents.action: chickens pecking at the ground and scattering as the character approaches

entered.detail: weathered mud-brick walls with small windows typical of ancient Egyptian architecture
rough wooden beams and planks forming overhead scaffolding between buildings
bright orange flame held by the character casting dynamic shadows on walls
large clay jars and bowls stacked against the wall

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow ancient Egyptian alley at night, holding a torch that illuminates the mud-brick walls and wooden scaffolding overhead. Chickens scatter on the dirt ground as the character moves forward through the enclosed passage.

scene_state.functional_zone: stone staircase leading to interior doorway

events.description: character enters the building through the wooden doorway, transitioning from exterior to interior

agents.ego_description: climbing stone stairs while holding the torch, approaching and entering a wooden doorway

entered.detail: weathered stone steps ascending between mud-brick walls
simple wooden door frame leading into the building interior
smooth plastered interior walls with fabric hangings visible inside

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a stone staircase between mud-brick walls, approaching a wooden doorway. At around 18 seconds, the character enters the building, transitioning from the outdoor alley to an interior space with plaster walls.

scene_state.functional_zone: interior room with fabric hangings and wooden doorways

events.description: character exits the building through a doorway, emerging onto an elevated stone corridor

agents.ego_description: walking through the interior room with fabric hangings, then exiting through a doorway to an exterior elevated walkway

entered.detail: colorful fabric curtains and tapestries hanging on interior walls
covered stone walkway with tiled flooring connecting buildings

segments.scene_description: Inside the building, the character moves past fabric hangings and pottery, then exits through a doorway around the 25-second mark, emerging onto an elevated stone corridor that connects to an exterior walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated wooden walkway over water with reeds

agents.ego_description: walking carefully across the elevated wooden planks, holding the torch out to illuminate the water and reeds below

entered.detail: rickety wooden plank walkway elevated above the water with rope railings
tall reeds and papyrus growing in the water below the walkway
palm trees visible in the distance against the night sky

segments.scene_description: The character traverses an elevated wooden walkway that extends over water filled with tall reeds. Palm trees are visible in the distance against the night sky as the character carefully walks across the wooden planks, with mud-brick buildings now visible closer on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered alleyway transitioning to open courtyard

events.description: torch extinguishes, significantly reducing visibility and changing the scene to moonlight-only illumination
text overlay 'Memphis' appears in the lower right corner identifying the location
character emerges from the covered alley into an open courtyard with palm trees

agents.ego_description: walking through dark alleys after the torch extinguishes, navigating by moonlight toward an open area with palm trees

notable_agents.action: distant figure walking through the alley ahead of the character

entered.detail: tall weathered mud-brick walls forming a narrow passage
tattered fabric canopy stretched between buildings overhead
open plaza area with palm trees visible at the end of the alley

segments.scene_description: After descending from the walkway, the torch extinguishes around 45 seconds, plunging the scene into darkness lit only by moonlight. The character continues through covered alleys with fabric awnings as the text 'Memphis' appears. A distant figure walks ahead, and the character eventually emerges around 58 seconds into an open courtyard with palm trees.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through the narrow, torch-lit alleys of ancient Memphis that eventually opens into a moonlit courtyard. It begins in a cramped mud-brick passage where chickens scatter under wooden scaffolding, moving forward until the character ascends a stone staircase and enters a building with plaster walls. The scene then shifts through an interior filled with pottery and fabric hangings before emerging onto an elevated wooden walkway that extends over reed-filled water and distant palm trees. As the character descends back to the ground, the torch extinguishes and the lighting transitions from warm firelight to cool moonlight, guiding the camera through covered alleys with fabric awnings. Finally, the movement leads past a distant figure and opens into a wide courtyard surrounded by palm trees.
